channel.title: Linux on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on Frank Huang

item.title: Different ways of removing files with exclusion
item.description: We all know that removing files in linux is just rm. But what if we want to remove files that we don’t want in the specified directory? In this blog, I will summarize some ways to exclude ls rm ls -I <file1> -I <file2> ...

item.title: learning vim for data scientist
item.description: Tips for using vim Cursor movement: hjkl for left, up, down, right, [number]j to relative line down, [number]k to relative line down, G to the last row, gg to the first row, $ to the end of current row, 0 or ^ to the start of current row, line number+G to the specified row, <ctrl>+o to jump back to the previous position, <ctrl>+i undo the jump back operation. <ctrl>+B to page up, <ctrl>+D to page down.
